name: Marinated Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pork with salt.
2. Add garlic and oregano to blended chili.
3. Pour the mixture over the meat and marinate in the refrigerator for 6-8 hours or overnight.
4. Cook slowly on top of the stove or in a preheated oven at 350°F until the meat is done, about 1 hour.
5. Thick slices of potatoes may be marinated with the meat.
